accepted.name: front
accepted.training_caption: ai51char, A young woman with short brown hair styled in a slightly tousled bob, bright blue eyes, and a small petite build with slender proportions. She wears a fitted brown leather jacket with silver zipper hardware and structured shoulders, over a crisp white button-up collared shirt. Around her neck hangs a bold blue necktie, matching her blue thigh-high stockings. She wears a fitted brown leather mini skirt with a matching leather belt with a silver rectangular buckle, brown leather knee-high boots with low heels and buckle details, and brown leather gloves, front
